text: kubectl get pods -n <ns> lists pods in a namespace; add --field-selector status.phase=Running to show only running pods
kubectl rollout restart deployment/<name> restarts a deployment by rolling its pods one by one with zero downtime
kubectl rollout undo deployment/<name> rolls a deployment back to its previous revision
ImagePullBackOff means the kubelet could not pull the container image; verify the image name, tag, and registry credentials (imagePullSecrets)
CrashLoopBackOff means the container starts then exits repeatedly; inspect kubectl logs --previous and the container command and probes
kubectl logs --previous <pod> shows logs from the previous crashed container instance
